narrative:
Precinct Brunswick City 3-D (precinct in Medina County) has 733 registered voters, with 59.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.6 percentage points.
